rationale: Seventeen exact official MTA route rows each bind one current route, one realized effective date, and exactly two source-stated treatment members. Every non-treatment sentence is exhaustively classified as route qualifier, alternative-service context, separate-route context, navigation, or timetable context. Q5, Q80, Q98, and Q47 remain context-only and create no route edge. The excluded Q76 row is not included because strict clause accounting yields more than two treatment members.
